description_long: This is a single-story rectangular house with a simple, modern design. The exterior walls are smooth and painted white, featuring two large rectangular windows on both the front and back sides, each with blue-tinted glass and white frames. The roof is a prominent, low-pitched gable style covered with reddish-brown shingles arranged in neat rows. The main entryway is located on one of the shorter sides and consists of a double yellow door with glass panels, framed by subtle white trim. There are no visible decorative elements, porches, or steps, giving the house a clean and functional appearance. The overall structure suggests a compact, efficient residential building suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A compact, single-story white house with a low-pitched shingle roof, large blue windows, and a yellow double-door entryway. The design is simple and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: This view shows the long side of the house with two large blue windows set in a plain white wall beneath the shingle roof.
description_view_1: This view displays the roof from above, highlighting the reddish-brown shingle pattern and the overhanging eaves, with no windows or doors visible.
description_view_2: This view mirrors view 0, showing the opposite long side with two identical blue windows and the same white wall and roof structure.
description_view_3: This view features the main entryway with a yellow double door and glass panels, set in a white wall beneath the shingle roof, with no windows visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Double yellow door with glass panels, no porch or steps, minimal trim
